build: Build #29 — 200 OK + SSE with multi-chunk JSON objects (title + cards)

ui_result.user_experience: Same empty 1-card outline as Builds #27/#28. Multi-chunk JSON objects not rendered.

console_errors: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request

diagnosis.conclusion: Build #29 (multi-chunk JSON objects with title+cards) produced same empty result. The outline schema mismatch persists. Gamma's EventSource handler processes chunks but the JSON structure doesn't match the expected format.
diagnosis.key_finding: Only Build #26's single large JSON object produced visible content. Multi-chunk delivery with separate title and cards objects failed. Gamma likely expects the ENTIRE outline in a SINGLE JSON object within one SSE chunk, not split across multiple chunks. The outline parser may call JSON.parse() on the full accumulated text, not on individual chunks.
diagnosis.recommendation: Try single-chunk delivery with the complete Gamma outline JSON format in one SSE data line. Reference the Gamma HAR analysis (#029) for the exact expected JSON schema.
